user_query:
Please read input/topic.txt for the topic and input/keywords.txt for the comma-separated keywords. Generate 7 SEO-friendly, click-worthy blog post titles optimized for search and social engagement, then write them to output/titles.txt.

Formatting and validation rules:
- Exactly 7 lines, each numbered "1. " through "7. " in order (e.g., "1. ...").
- Each line (including the "N. " prefix) must be between 50 and 60 characters inclusive.
- Each title must include all keywords from input/keywords.txt exactly as written (case-insensitive substring match for each keyword).
- After the numbering, ensure variety:
  - At least one title must start with "How".
  - At least one title must contain the word "Guide" anywhere.
  - At least one title must start with a digit (listicle style) immediately after the numbering (e.g., "3 ways...").
- At least two titles must include at least one of these power words: Ultimate, Complete, Essential, Proven (case-insensitive).
- Return only the titles (no extra commentary, headers, or blank lines).

Write the final results to output/titles.txt.
